gates.title: Claude Code sees the managed NEXO MCP server from the real user config path
evidence_required: Managed client sync writes NEXO MCP to ~/.claude.json
Claude Code settings.json remains in sync for hooks/bootstrap
Local Claude MCP smoke confirms the NEXO server is connected

gates.title: Runtime surfaces stay honest around schedules, script boundaries, and retroactive learnings
evidence_required: Schedule status distinguishes open/running runs from real failures
Core-vs-personal script classification reads the packaged/runtime surface robustly
Retroactive learnings ignore keyword-only false positives outside declared applies_to scope

gates.title: Final release audit works across real repo/runtime layouts
evidence_required: Final release audit can resolve repo root from cwd, runtime metadata, or Project Atlas
Release readiness passes against the repo and website roots used for publication

gates.title: Public package, docs, blog, changelog, llms, and sitemap tell the same release story
evidence_required: Root package and integration artifacts all point to 5.3.6
The release article and sitemap include the new patch release
